evals.expected_output: Audit fills source/sink/guard/reproducer but keeps status candidate when observed_result is unknown and records evidence.observed_result in provenance.unverified_fields.

assertions.text: observed_result unknown must not be confirmed

evals.expected_output: Audit blocks likely duplicate advisories with status blocked, a duplicate CVE/GHSA signal, and blockers.
Confirmed audit output includes concrete source, sink, guard, reproducer, observed_result, CVSS vector, and completed dedup fields.

assertions.text: confirmed output must include complete traceable evidence

evals.expected_output: Audit confirms a finding where a guard exists but is bypassable, documenting the bypass technique in the guard field.

assertions.text: bypassable guard must document the bypass technique

evals.expected_output: Audit blocks when source code is not publicly accessible, listing all evidence fields as unverified.

assertions.text: inaccessible source must block with all fields unverified

evals.expected_output: Audit confirms a critical SSTI with scope change, CVSS 10.0, and complete evidence chain.

assertions.text: scope-changed SSTI must have CVSS >= 9.0 and S:C in vector
